title: Why Are We Starting The Year With A Bond Rout
section_path: Why Are We Starting The Year With A Bond Rout
section_path_text: Why Are We Starting The Year With A Bond Rout
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week
Global bond and equity markets have been markedly weaker in the beginning of the year. The reason behind this is policy uncertainty out of Washington, both on the executive and the central bank level. Although some weakness is highlighted, the UK is impacted similarly to most markets in the world.
